title: clinopodium hortense
intro: Clinopodium hortense, also known as 'Hortensia', is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Clinopodium hortense has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Clinopodium hortense can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and culinary applications.
